---
name: Feature request
about: New pattern, instrument, step, or wizard behavior
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Which part of the wizard does it affect?**
- [ ] A new wizard step
- [ ] A new audio preview
- [ ] A new instrument / soundfont
- [ ] MIDI or WAV export
- [ ] Lyrics analysis
- [ ] v2.0 sample tool
- [ ] GUI / UX
- [ ] Other

**Why is it useful?**
What musical problem does it solve?

**References (optional)**
Links to similar tools, academic papers, or songs that illustrate the idea.
